summary: Iteration 18 - Testing Gallery Base64 Upload and Status Email Features. All 14 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend UI verified: Gallery tab has 'Nahrát' upload buttons for BEFORE/AFTER images, Objednávky tab has status change buttons (Čeká/Potvrzeno/Dokončeno/Zrušeno) that trigger status emails. Backend logs confirm emails sent successfully to admin email.

minor.issue: Used modified_count instead of matched_count - returned 404 when status was already the same. FIXED by changing to matched_count.

passed_tests: === BACKEND API TESTS (14/14 passed) ===
Admin login works with password SeknuTo2025!
POST /api/admin/gallery/upload returns base64 data URL (data:image/png;base64,...)
POST /api/admin/gallery/upload requires authentication (401)
POST /api/admin/gallery/upload rejects invalid file type (400)
POST /api/admin/gallery/projects with base64 before/after images creates project
GET /api/gallery/projects returns projects with base64 URLs
PATCH /api/admin/bookings/{id}/status to 'confirmed' returns success:true
PATCH /api/admin/bookings/{id}/status to 'completed' returns success:true
PATCH /api/admin/bookings/{id}/status to 'cancelled' returns success:true
PATCH /api/admin/bookings/{id}/status rejects invalid status (400)
PATCH /api/admin/bookings/{id}/status returns 404 for nonexistent booking
POST /api/contact saves message and returns success with ID
Contact message persisted in database (verified via admin endpoint)
All email template functions properly defined and working
=== FRONTEND UI TESTS ===
Admin login page loads correctly
Gallery tab shows 'Přidat projekt Před/Po' form
Gallery tab has 2 'Nahrát' (Upload) buttons - one for FOTKA PŘED, one for FOTKA PO
Gallery projects display with base64 images (green squares with PŘED/PO labels)
Objednávky tab shows 16 bookings with status badges
Booking row expands on click showing customer details
Status change buttons visible: Čeká, Potvrzeno, Dokončeno, Zrušeno
Clicking 'Potvrzeno' button updates status and shows toast 'Status aktualizován'
=== BACKEND LOGS VERIFICATION ===
Gallery image uploaded as base64 (confirmed in logs)
Status email 'confirmed' sent to dusanmachacek.v@gmail.com
Status email 'completed' sent to dusanmachacek.v@gmail.com
Status email 'cancelled' sent to dusanmachacek.v@gmail.com
Contact auto-reply sent to admin email
Contact auto-reply fails for non-admin emails (expected - unverified Resend domain)
critical_code_review_comments: Gallery upload now stores images as base64 data URLs in MongoDB - persistent across Render restarts
Status email templates properly defined: get_customer_confirmed_email_html, get_customer_completed_email_html, get_customer_cancelled_email_html
Email sending is non-blocking (uses asyncio.to_thread) and non-critical (errors logged but don't fail API)
Fixed: Changed modified_count to matched_count in status update to handle idempotent updates
seed_data_creation: Created test gallery projects with base64 images, test contact messages
context_for_next_testing_agent: Gallery upload now returns base64 data URLs instead of /uploads/ paths. Status emails (confirmed/completed/cancelled) are sent when admin updates booking status. Customer emails fail due to unverified Resend domain but admin emails work. Contact form auto-reply works for admin email.

mocked_apis_list: Customer confirmation emails (Resend domain unverified - only admin email works)
mocked_apis.note: Resend emails only work for admin email (dusanmachacek.v@gmail.com). Customer emails fail with 'You can only send testing emails to your own email address' error.

gallery_base64_upload.POST_upload: Returns base64 data URL (data:image/png;base64,...) instead of /uploads/ path
gallery_base64_upload.persistence: Images stored in MongoDB, persist across Render restarts
gallery_base64_upload.file_validation: Only allows image/jpeg, image/png, image/webp, image/gif

booking_status_emails.confirmed: Sends 'Termín potvrzen' email with get_customer_confirmed_email_html template
booking_status_emails.completed: Sends 'Práce dokončena' email with get_customer_completed_email_html template
booking_status_emails.cancelled: Sends 'Rezervace zrušena' email with get_customer_cancelled_email_html template
booking_status_emails.api_response: Returns {success: true} for all status updates

contact_form_auto_reply.POST_contact: Saves message to DB, sends admin notification, sends auto-reply to customer
